revision.comment: remove headings and try a purely wikilist format
revision.text:
{{Sidebar | templatestyles = Template:Lua sidebar/styles.css | title = [[Wikipedia:Authority control]] | aboveclass = hlist | contentclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist
| above = * [[Template talk:Authority control|Discussion]]
| content1 = ; [[Template:Authority control|Template]] :; [[Special:PrefixIndex/Template:Authority control/|subpages]] :: [[Template:Authority control/staging|staging]] :: [[Template:Authority control/sandbox|sandbox]] :: [[Template:Authority control/testcases|testcases]] :: [[Template:Authority control/doc|doc]] ; [[Module:Authority control|Module]] :; [[Special:PrefixIndex/Module:Authority control/|subpages]] :: [[Module:Authority control/sandbox|sandbox]] :: [[Module talk:Authority control/testcases|testcases]] :: [[Module:Authority control/doc|doc]]
: [[Module:Authority control/config|Config]] :: [[Module:Authority control/config/staging|staging]] :: [[Module:Authority control/config/sandbox|sandbox]]
: [[Module:Authority control/auxiliary|Auxiliary]] :: [[Module:Authority control/auxiliary/sandbox|sandbox]]
: [[Module:Authority control/documentation|Doc module]] :: [[Module:Authority control/documentation/sandbox|sandbox]]
| below = * [[Wikipedia:Authority control/dashboard|Dashboard]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia authority control|Category]] ** [[:Category:Pages with authority control identifiers needing attention|attention]]
| name = {{#invoke:params|self}} }}

{{Sidebar | templatestyles = Template:Lua sidebar/styles.css | title = [[Wikipedia:Authority control]] | aboveclass = hlist | contentclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist
| above = * [[Template talk:Authority control|Discussion]]
| content1 = ; [[Template:Authority control|Template]] :; [[Special:PrefixIndex/Template:Authority control/|subpages]] :: [[Template:Authority control/staging|staging]] :: [[Template:Authority control/sandbox|sandbox]] :: [[Template:Authority control/testcases|testcases]] :: [[Template:Authority control/doc|doc]] ; [[Module:Authority control|Module]] :; [[Special:PrefixIndex/Module:Authority control/|subpages]] :: [[Module:Authority control/sandbox|sandbox]] :: [[Module talk:Authority control/testcases|testcases]] :: [[Module:Authority control/doc|doc]]
: [[Module:Authority control/config|Config]] :: [[Module:Authority control/config/staging|staging]] :: [[Module:Authority control/config/sandbox|sandbox]]
: [[Module:Authority control/auxiliary|Auxiliary]] :: [[Module:Authority control/auxiliary/sandbox|sandbox]]
: [[Module:Authority control/documentation|Doc module]] :: [[Module:Authority control/documentation/sandbox|sandbox]]
| below = * [[Wikipedia:Authority control/dashboard|Dashboard]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia authority control|Category]] ** [[:Category:Pages with authority control identifiers needing attention|attention]]
| name = {{#invoke:params|self}} }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

| above = * [[Template talk:Authority control|Discussion]]
| content1 = ; [[Template:Authority control|Template]] :; [[Special:PrefixIndex/Template:Authority control/|subpages]] :: [[Template:Authority control/staging|staging]] :: [[Template:Authority control/sandbox|sandbox]] :: [[Template:Authority control/testcases|testcases]] :: [[Template:Authority control/doc|doc]] ; [[Module:Authority control|Module]] :; [[Special:PrefixIndex/Module:Authority control/|subpages]] :: [[Module:Authority control/sandbox|sandbox]] :: [[Module talk:Authority control/testcases|testcases]] :: [[Module:Authority control/doc|doc]]

| below = * [[Wikipedia:Authority control/dashboard|Dashboard]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia authority control|Category]] ** [[:Category:Pages with authority control identifiers needing attention|attention]]
| name = {{#invoke:params|self}} }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Sidebar | templatestyles = Template:Lua sidebar/styles.css | title = [[Wikipedia:Authority control]] | aboveclass = hlist | contentclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Authority_control%2Frelated here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Authority_control%2Frelated for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Sidebar | templatestyles = Template:Lua sidebar/styles.css | title = Wikipedia authority control | aboveclass = hlist | contentclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist

; [[Module:Authority control/auxiliary|Auxiliary]] : [[Module:Authority control/auxiliary/sandbox|sandbox]]
; [[Module:Authority control/documentation|Doc module]] : [[Module:Authority control/documentation/sandbox|sandbox]]
; [[:Category:Wikipedia authority control|Category]] : [[:Category:Pages with authority control identifiers needing attention|attention]]
| name = {{#invoke:TEMPLATENAME|main}} }}
